name: Permian World
description: Adds Permian era creatures, prehistoric harvest materials, and craftable prehistoric gear to Cataclysm Dark Days Ahead. Includes biome spawn groups, lifecycle content, prehistoric materials and map specials. Adds custom starts, scenarios, and themed professions. Adds regional loot groups for nests, bone fields, predator dens, badlands, and rocky uplands. Expanded with an extra wave of small reptiles, mid-tier hunters, giant herbivores, apex predators, and swamp monsters. Full lifecycle update adds juvenile forms and reproduction across the broader creature roster. Expanded hide crafting adds new prehistoric hide clothing and utility wearables. Hideworking now uses a proper cure-to-tan processing chain for prehistoric hides instead of a shortcut drying step. Adds defended egg nests, egg-laying reproduction for designated species, and a JSON incubation-to-hatching loop for carried eggs.
